artifacts.title: Bet Tracker
artifacts.description: A live ledger of standing wagers, styled like a real sportsbook. Bet slips, stakes, and countdowns.

artifacts.title: Q Meter
artifacts.description: How unhinged is Q right now? A live, doomsday-clock-style meter.

artifacts.title: Baby Pool
artifacts.description: Guess the baby's birth date, weight, and gender. $20 buy-in, winner takes all.
